notableEvents.label: Kyle Farmer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Farmer grounds out, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Riley grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Matt Olson out at 2nd. Austin Riley out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Graham Pauley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Graham Pauley grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Jorge Mateo to first baseman Matt Olson. Heriberto Hernández out at 2nd. Graham Pauley out at 1st.
